case_title: HOYT, MARJORIE A. VS SHEA & LABAGH ACCOUNTS INCORPORATED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOYT, MARJORIE A. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEA & LABAGH ACCOUNTS INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

CERT. RECEIPT TO JOHN H. SHEA RETURNED SIGNED.
